DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT JAN SCHOLES' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF LEE DEBROFF S PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (CCP SECTION 2031.320), AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 2023.010 AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY, ERIK PETERSON - DEFENDANT JAN BLAUSTEIN SCHOLES' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF LEE DEBROFF TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IN COMPLIANCE WITH PLAINTIFF'S VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL PRODUCE ALL NON-PRIVILEGED DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO CATEGORY NOS. 1 AND 4 OF DEFENDANT'S FIRST DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, WITHIN 20 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY SHALL PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,540 TO DEFENDANT, WITHIN 20 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET NIVER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT JAN SCHOLES' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF LEE DEBROFF TO ANSWER AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO SUPPLEMENTAL DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 2023.010 AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY, ERIK PETERSON - DEFENDANT JAN BLAUSTEIN SCHOLES' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF LEE DEBROFF TO PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST SUPPLEMENTAL DEMAND TO IDENTIFY AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO DEFENDANT'S FIRST SUPPLEMENTAL DEMAND TO IDENTIFY AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS, AND SHALL PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, WITHIN 20 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF AND HIS ATTORNEY SHALL PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,715.90 TO DEFENDANT, WITHIN 20 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET NIVER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Jan Blaustein Scholes To Compel Plaintiff Lee Debroff S Production Of Documents (Ccp Section 2031.320), And Request For Monetary Sanctions Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure Section 2023.010 Against Plaintiff And His Attorney, Erik Peterson
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BLAKE BOSTWICK OF BOSTWICK & PETERSEN APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PETER MALLON OF HASSARD BONNINGTON, TEL. NO. 1-415-288-99800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT JAN SCHOLES' Motion To Compel Plaintiff Lee Debroff S Production Of Documents (Ccp Section 2031.320), And Request For Monetary Sanctions Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure Section 2023.010 Against Plaintiff And His Attorney, Erik Peterson - Defendant Jan Blaustein Scholes' Motion to Compel Plaintiff Lee Debroff to produce documents in compliance with Plaintiff's verified responses to Defendant's First Demand for Inspection of Documents and for sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall produce all non-privileged documents responsive to Category Nos. 1 and 4 of Defendant's First Demand for Inspection of Documents, within 20 days after notice of entry of this order. Plaintiff and his attorney shall pay sanctions in the amount of $1,540 to Defendant, within 20 days after notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem: Margaret Niver; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Jan Blaustein Scholes To Compel Plaintiff Lee Debroff To Answer And Produce Documents In Response To Supplemental Demand For Inspection Of Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure Section 2023.010 Against Plaintiff And His Attorney, Erik Peterson
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BLAKE BOSTWICK OF BOSTWICK & PETERSEN APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PETER MALLON OF HASSARD BONNINGTON, TEL. NO. 1-415-288-99800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT JAN SCHOLES' Motion To Compel Plaintiff Lee Debroff To Answer And Produce Documents In Response To Supplemental Demand For Inspection Of Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure Section 2023.010 Against Plaintiff And His Attorney, Erik Peterson - Defendant Jan Blaustein Scholes' Motion to Compel Plaintiff Lee Debroff to provide verified responses without objection to Defendant's First Supplemental Demand to Identify and Produce Documents is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall serve verified responses, without objection, to Defendant's First Supplemental Demand to Identify and Produce Documents, and shall produce all responsive documents, within 20 days after notice of entry of this order. Plaintiff and his attorney shall pay sanctions in the amount of $1,715.90 to Defendant, within 20 days after notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro tem: Margaret Niver; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
